Compute costs range from $0.0832/hour for t3.large instances to $0.252/hour for memory-optimized r5.xlarge. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reserved instances deliver up to 72% savings"}]," with 3-year commitments, while spot instances provide up to 90% discounts for fault-tolerant workloads."]}]
35:["$","p",null,{"children":"Storage pricing follows a tiered model: S3 Standard at $0.023/GB/month, with intelligent tiering automatically optimizing costs. Database services like Aurora charge $0.10/GB/month for storage plus per-ACU pricing for serverless configurations. Data transfer costs start at $0.09/GB for the first 10TB monthly, with 100GB free tier."}]

R2 storage costs $0.015/GB/month with no data transfer charges, while Workers provide serverless computing at $5/month minimum plus usage-based pricing."]}]
48:["$","p",null,{"children":["The platform excels for ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"static sites and JAMstack applications"}],", with estimated costs of $100-500 monthly for 100,000 users. Global edge network spans 330+ data centers, delivering sub-100ms latency worldwide."]}]
49:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"vercel-developer-experience-leader","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#vercel-developer-experience-leader","className":"peer","children":"Vercel: Developer experience leader"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
4a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Vercel's Pro plan at $20/user/month includes 1TB bandwidth and 1M function invocations. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Costs can scale dramatically"}],": the Cara app faced $98,280 monthly for 56M daily function invocations, highlighting the importance of usage monitoring."]}]
4b:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best suited for frontend-heavy applications"}]," with moderate backend requirements, expecting $80-200 monthly for small teams but potentially thousands for high-traffic scenarios."]}]
4c:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"digitalocean-balanced-simplicity","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#digitalocean-balanced-simplicity","className":"peer","children":"DigitalOcean: Balanced simplicity"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
4d:["$","p",null,{"children":["DigitalOcean provides ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"predictable pricing"}]," with comprehensive managed services. Droplets start at $4/month, while managed databases begin at $15/month with automated backups included. Load balancers cost $12/month each."]}]
4e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Expect ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"$$500-2,000 monthly"}]," for 100,000 user applications, with excellent documentation and developer-friendly tools justifying the moderate premium over pure VPS providers."]}]
4f:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"optimization-strategies-comparison","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#optimization-strategies-comparison","className":"peer","children":"Optimization strategies comparison"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
50:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reserved instances and commitments"}]," provide the largest savings opportunities. AWS offers up to 72% discounts with 3-year reserved instances, GCP provides 70% committed use discounts, and Azure delivers 72% reserved instance savings. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Combining Azure Hybrid Benefit with reserved instances achieves 85% total savings"}],"."]}]
51:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Spot/preemptible instances"}]," offer substantial discounts: AWS spot instances (90% savings), GCP preemptible instances (60-91% savings), and Azure spot instances (90% savings). These work best for batch processing, CI/CD pipelines, and fault-tolerant applications."]}]
52:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage optimization"}]," through lifecycle policies automatically transitions data to cheaper tiers. S3 Intelligent Tiering, GCP lifecycle management, and Azure blob storage tiering can reduce storage costs by 50-80% for infrequently accessed data."]}]
53:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"hidden-costs-and-pitfalls","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#hidden-costs-and-pitfalls","className":"peer","children":"Hidden costs and pitfalls"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
54:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data transfer fees"}]," represent the largest surprise cost factor. AWS charges $0.09/GB egress, GCP charges $0.12/GB, and Azure charges $0.087/GB after free tiers. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cloudflare's zero egress fees"}]," provide significant advantages for content-heavy applications."]}]
55:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Support costs"}]," scale dramatically with usage. AWS Enterprise support costs 10% of monthly charges with $15,000 minimum, GCP Premium support requires $12,500/month plus 4% consumption, and Azure Premier support uses custom pricing models."]}]
56:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cross-zone and cross-region charges"}]," accumulate quickly. AWS charges $0.01/GB for cross-AZ traffic, while GCP and Azure have similar inter-zone fees. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Careful architectural planning"}]," minimizes these charges through regional deployment strategies."]}]
57:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"recommendations-by-use-case","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#recommendations-by-use-case","className":"peer","children":"Recommendations by use case"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
58:["$","p",null,{"children":"Supporting 100,000 users requires sophisticated cloud infrastructure with careful cost optimization. After analyzing current 2024-2025 pricing across major providers, this report delivers actionable insights for budget planning and architectural decisions."}]
59:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"️-technical-requirements-baseline","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#️-technical-requirements-baseline","className":"peer","children":"🏗️ Technical requirements baseline"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
5a:["$","p",null,{"children":["For 100,000 registered users, expect ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"5,000-15,000 peak concurrent users"}]," based on industry patterns. This translates to specific infrastructure needs: 80-320 vCPUs across application servers, 128-256 GB RAM for primary databases, 750 Mbps to 1.5 Gbps peak bandwidth, and 10,000-20,000 database IOPS. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"The key insight"}],": most applications need to plan for 20% of their user base being active simultaneously during peak periods."]}]
5b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Modern architectures require multi-layer scaling with load balancers, CDN offloading (targeting 90% cache hit rates), and database read replicas. The optimal setup typically involves 10-20 application servers, primary database with 2-3 read replicas, and Redis caching clusters across multiple availability zones."}]
5c:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"budget-conscious-applications-500-2000month","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#budget-conscious-applications-500-2000month","className":"peer","children":"Budget-conscious applications ($500-2,000/month)"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
5d:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Primary recommendation"}],": Hetzner + Cloudflare combination. Use Hetzner CCX instances for compute workloads (€400-500/month) combined with Cloudflare for CDN, edge functions, and R2 storage. This delivers enterprise-grade performance at startup pricing."]}]
5e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Secondary option"}],": DigitalOcean managed services provide comprehensive features with predictable pricing, ideal for teams prioritizing simplicity over absolute cost optimization."]}]
5f:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"performance-critical-applications-3000-15000month","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#performance-critical-applications-3000-15000month","className":"peer","children":"Performance-critical applications ($3,000-15,000/month)"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
60:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Primary recommendation"}],": AWS with aggressive optimization. Leverage 3-year reserved instances, spot instances for batch workloads, and CloudFront CDN. Expect $3,750-6,250 monthly with proper planning."]}]
61:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Alternative approach"}],": GCP with committed use discounts excels for data-intensive applications requiring BigQuery analytics or AI/ML integration."]}]
62:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"developer-friendly-platforms-1000-5000month","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#developer-friendly-platforms-1000-5000month","className":"peer","children":"Developer-friendly platforms ($1,000-5,000/month)"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
63:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Primary recommendation"}],": Vercel + Cloudflare for frontend-heavy applications. Monitor usage carefully to prevent unexpected scaling costs. Suitable for teams prioritizing deployment velocity over cost optimization."]}]
64:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Enterprise alternative"}],": Azure with Hybrid Benefit provides excellent developer tools while leveraging existing Microsoft licensing investments."]}]
65:["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"enterprise-compliance-requirements-15000-50000month","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#enterprise-compliance-requirements-15000-50000month","className":"peer","children":"Enterprise compliance requirements ($15,000-50,000/month)"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
66:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Primary recommendation"}],": AWS Enterprise support with comprehensive compliance certifications (SOC, HIPAA, FedRAMP). The $15,000 monthly support minimum provides dedicated technical account management and 15-minute response times."]}]
67:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"conclusion","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#conclusion","className":"peer","children":"Conclusion"}],["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}]
68:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"The optimal choice depends critically on application characteristics and team expertise"}],". Hetzner provides unmatched cost efficiency for European applications, while AWS offers comprehensive enterprise features for global scale. Cloudflare's edge network and zero egress fees benefit content-heavy applications, and Azure excels for Microsoft-centric enterprises."]}]
69:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost optimization requires active management"}]," regardless of provider choice. Reserved instances, aggressive caching strategies, and careful monitoring prevent budget overruns while maintaining performance standards. Most organizations benefit from multi-cloud strategies leveraging each provider's unique strengths rather than single-vendor solutions."]}]
